Class OutputPanel

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
javax.swing.JComponent
javax.swing.text.JTextComponent
javax.swing.JTextArea
task.trak.app.client.gui.view.panel.OutputPanel
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible, Scrollable
public class OutputPanel extends JTextArea
Monospace text area for displaying raw command output. Used as the fallback view inside ContentPanel.
See Also:
